basic_details.job_title: Alagappa University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Alagappa University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Research Associate and Field Investigator Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.all_candidates_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Library and Information Science with 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil. /Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience for Research Associate. Graduate in any Social Science Discipline with minimum 55% marks for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Associate: Postgraduate in Library and Information Science with 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil. /Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience. Field Investigator: Graduate in any Social Science Discipline with minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year graduation programme.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 47,000/- (Per Month) for Research Associate, Rs. 20,000/- (Per Month) for Field Investigator
salary_details.details: Research Associate: Rs. 47,000/- Per Month Field Investigator: Rs. 20,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Alagappa University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.alagappa_university: Rs. 47,000/- (Per Month) for Research Associate, Rs. 20,000/- (Per Month) for Field Investigator

Postgraduate in Library and Information Science with 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil. /Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience for Research Associate. Graduate in any Social Science Discipline with minimum 55% marks for Field Investigator.

content_sections.heading: Alagappa University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Alagappa University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Alagappa University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Alagappa University Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Postgraduate in Library and Information Science with 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil. /Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience. Field Investigator: Graduate in any Social Science Discipline with minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year graduation programme.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Alagappa University Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Rs. 47,000/- Per Month Field Investigator: Rs. 20,000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Alagappa University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Alagappa University recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your bio-data via email for the Alagappa University recruitment is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Field Investigator?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by Alagappa University for the posts of Research Associate and Field Investigator. One vacancy is for Research Associate and the other is for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Research Associate position, candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Library and Information Science with at least 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and two years of research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Investigator post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Interested candidates need to send their bio-data and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. When is the interview date for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates will be conducted on 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Research Associate and Field Investigator at Alagappa University are on a temporary basis.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be sent along with the bio-data?
faq.answer: Candidates need to send copies of educational qualifications from 10th onwards, testimonials, and experience certificates along with their bio-data.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Alagappa University located?
faq.answer: Alagappa University is located in Karaikudi, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 630003.
